core_mechanism: assigning an algebraic-topological invariant to a structure by forming the groupoid of its translational/dynamical equivalences and taking that groupoid's cocycle cohomology as a classifying invariant
brief_reason: The abstract defines the cohomology of a point pattern as the cocycle cohomology of its associated pattern groupoid (built from dynamical systems on the pattern) and computes this invariant, which is the transferable groupoid-cohomology construction independent of the tiling subject matter.
